reviews.review_title: Very fun if you have people to play with
reviews.review_description: The game is no longer shut down and the codes work! Since it was shutdown there is not much people on it right now but hopefully more people get this game. If you have some people to play this game with it is very fun and spooky. It kinda gives you a cool nostalgic feeling.

reviews.review_title: The game has to be back
reviews.review_description: The last time a played the codes was working and all that but when I joined a server everyone wasn’t talking and they didn’t here me so I thought they didn’t have mic but actually this happened 2 times and it was because mics wasn’t working so I hope the game comes back.
THERE IS NO WAY ITS BACK
i saw the reviews and i thought that it came back but i guess it already shut down again. because whenever i joined it said check your internet. maybe it'll come back again

If you are seeing this the game has been officially shut down, due to Modders ruining the game, I really loved the game, I love the fan base, except the modders, this game was really fun and I enjoyed every second of playing, Quantom, I hope you make good game, just like “Scary Gorilla Horror”, it was fun while it lasted✋🙂‍↕️

reviews.review_title: Owner can you give me mod menu plsse
reviews.review_description: The game is very cool and you can play with friends and run from monsters, so the game is very cool, creator, can you give me the menu mod, I want it I can tell you that I never swear and I am kind and I love to communicate with players and the cards will help new players please give me the mod menu I really want it Please give me this.

First of all, you are lagging my game. They keep spawning stalkers all around the map making your game crash and freeze. Second, with their jmancurly head, they are kicking people with it. The game overall would be fun if they would stop abusing their powers. This is why I wrote this review, I’m really mad at the owners. 1 STAR (would write 0 but I can’t) and I’m pretty sure you want people to play your game, but al, this is gonna do is make people mad and play different games. If you are just going to keep abusing your powers and making the game not fun, just take it down. The first day I played it was great. There were no mods who were abusing powers and we were just having fun playing. But the second day I played there were mods and wieners who were abusing their powers. So if you’re just going to abuse your powers, just take this game down. (Ps. I would find a different game to play.
